falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes above its 200-day moving average by 2% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above this key long-term support level would indicate a definitive bullish trend, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) increases by 150% compared to the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volatility would indicate a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the pattern's similarity to a bottom formation and invalidating the 'HOLD' call.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 50-day moving average crosses above the 200-day moving average (golden cross) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical signal would confirm a long-term bullish trend, falsifying the current 'HOLD' verdict by demonstrating a clear shift in market momentum opposite to a bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
